---
title: "Summary Statistics"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```


```{r}
#1. Summary statistics fxn.
#2. Input: results: data frame output from run_simulations(), new_population_size: an integer for the post-bottleneck population size (NOTE->keep only if need, not currently used in fxn.)
#3. Ouput: summary_statistic_table: a data frame with one row per allele and four columns: 'Mean_Final_Frequency', 'SD_Final_Frequency', 'Min_Frequency', and 'Max_Frequency'
summary_stats = function(results, new_population_size) {
  summary_statistic_table = results %>% 
    filter(generation == max(generation)) %>% 
    group_by(allele) %>% 
    summarise(
      mean_final_Freq = round(mean(frequency), 3),
      SD_Final_Freq = round(sd(frequency), 3),
      min_freq = round(min(frequency), 3),
      max_freq = round(max(frequency), 3)
    )
  return(summary_statistic_table)
}
```
